steps: Wash cultured hippocampal neurons with pre-warmed tyrode.
Fix the cells with fixative solution for 00:15:00 at Room temperature .
After fixation, wash the cells with PBS.
Wash the cells briefly with PBS and incubate the cells with primary antibodies (1:500 ~ 1:2000) in a blocking buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature on a rocking platform.
Wash with PBS on a rocking platform.
Incubate the cells with secondary antibodies (for example Alexa-fluor-labeled) (1:1000) in a blocking buffer for 00:45:00 on a rocking platform at Room temperature in the dark.
Decant the secondary antibodies and wash with PBS.
Observe the fluorescence signal using an inverted confocal microscope or mount the samples with Prolong Gold antifade reagent for long-term storage
Wash cultured hippocampal neurons with pre-warmed tyrode. (1/3)
Wash cultured hippocampal neurons with pre-warmed tyrode. (2/3)
Wash cultured hippocampal neurons with pre-warmed tyrode. (3/3)
Incubate with blocking buffer for 00:30:00 at Room temperature .
Wash the cells with PBS. (1/3)
Wash the cells with PBS. (2/3)
Wash the cells with PBS. (3/3)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 on a rocking platform. (1/5)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 on a rocking platform. (2/5)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 on a rocking platform. (3/5)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 on a rocking platform. (4/5)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 on a rocking platform. (5/5)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 each in the dark. (1/5)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 each in the dark. (2/5)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 each in the dark. (3/5)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 each in the dark. (4/5)
Wash with PBS for 00:02:00 each in the dark. (5/5)
